falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) the post-2021Q4 × intervention-intensity interaction is zero or wrong-signed at p<0.10 (high-intervention countries should have smaller contraction), OR (b) intra-EU energy- intensive output gap (DEU+ITA vs FRA+ESP) does not widen by ≥5pp by 2024 relative to pre-shock baseline, OR (c) US Gulf Coast petrochemical capacity additions do not exceed pre-2022 trend, OR (d) the contraction reverses fully in 2024-2025 (cyclical not structural). If only the contemporaneous (2022-2023) effect is real and 2024-2025 shows recovery, classify as "cyclical shock without persistent relocation."

variables_missing.name: log_energy_intensive_manufacturing_va
variables_missing.source: constructed: OECD STAN VA — chemicals (C20) + basic metals (C24) + non-metallic minerals (C23) + paper (C17) + fertiliser. Cross-check Eurostat sbs_na_ind_r2 sectoral turnover.

variables_missing.name: log_steel_production
variables_missing.source: constructed: World Steel Association monthly crude-steel production by country. Manual-drop pending under data/manual/derived/.

variables_missing.name: log_ammonia_fertiliser_production
variables_missing.source: constructed: Fertilizers Europe / IFA monthly ammonia + nitrogen-fertiliser output by country. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: log_us_gulf_coast_petrochemical_capacity
variables_missing.source: constructed: ACC (American Chemistry Council) + EIA Gulf-Coast petrochemical capacity tracker. Cross-check eia: methanol / ethylene production. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: post_2021q4_gas_shock_dummy
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2021Q4 onwards (gas-price spike start).

variables_missing.name: country_gas_price_intervention_intensity
variables_missing.source: constructed: ordinal index of national wholesale-price interventions (0 = retail-only relief; 1 = retail + selective-industry rebate; 2 = wholesale-price cap or renationalisation). DEU/POL = 1, ESP/PRT = 2, FRA = 2 (EDF), ITA/NLD = 1, USA = 0.

variables_missing.name: log_gas_price_ttf
variables_missing.source: constructed: Dutch TTF natural gas spot/forward, EUR/MWh, monthly. Cross-check fred:DHHNGSP (Henry Hub for USA). Manual-drop or eex fetcher when shipped.
